run_shell.description: Execute a local shell command in a controlled, sandboxed environment. Only safe commands run automatically; some require confirmation; dangerous commands are blocked.

arguments.command: The shell command to execute, e.g. 'ls -la' or 'nvidia-smi'.

run_shell.returns: The command's stdout/stderr output, truncated if too long, plus an exit code.

get_current_time_in_timezone.description: Return the current time in a given timezone.
